title: Cracker Create
description: This mod is based on Cracker's Wither Storm and Create.
body:
## Description 
This modpack is a combination of [Cracker's Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) together Its purpose is to give you a better experience in the Minecraft world.
 and there are other mods for players to play.

By carrying out the story, players must manage to do it themselves.

## Warning
Warning, this modpack is in Alpha phase, there may be bugs which players have to fix by themselves.




Sorry if my English is not good because I use translate
